task_completion.description: Navigate to the team or permissions management page for the 'Zebrafish Gene Editing' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the project title 'Zebrafish Gene Editing' on the screen, with a tab or section like 'Team', 'Members', 'People', or 'Permissions' actively selected or displayed.

task_completion.description: Remove Jane Doe from the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the project members list for 'Zebrafish Gene Editing'. Jane Doe (jane.doe@example.com) should NOT be visible in the list, or look for a toast/notification confirming her removal.
Look for John Smith (john.smith@example.com) in the project members list. The role dropdown or text next to his name must display 'Guest'.

task_completion.description: Add Sarah Connor to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Sarah Connor (sarah.connor@example.com) in the project members list or look for a confirmation screen showing she was successfully added to the project.
Look for Sarah Connor in the project members list. The role dropdown or text next to her name must display 'User'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to manage permissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the SciNote interface, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine SciNote web application, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or database management tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to alter permissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of PostgreSQL, pgAdmin, or terminal SQL commands being executed to update user roles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 'Zebrafish Gene Editing'. Target Users and Emails: Jane Doe (jane.doe@example.com), John Smith (john.smith@example.com), Sarah Connor (sarah.connor@example.com). Expected Final Roles: John Smith must be 'Guest', Sarah Connor must be 'User', and Jane Doe must be completely removed from the project.
